name: Fulu of Concealment
description:
Duration 1 hour

This fulu comes in four pieces, one placed in each cardinal direction. Choose one of the following traits when Activating the fulus: animal, beast, celestial, fey, fiend, humanoid, monitor, plant, or undead. Those within the fulus' circle upon activation (including the fulus themselves) gain the effect of Invisibility Sphere, but only against creatures with the chosen trait. If any of the fulus are moved or destroyed after activation, the effect ends.
